---
title: ""
page-layout: article

---

## Hey!

I'm a computer engineering student who stumbled into open source through quantum physics — and honestly never looked back. This summer I'm a **Google Summer of Code 2026** contributor, working on making QuTiP's HEOM solver scale beyond a single machine.

## Current Work

**Google Summer of Code 2026 Contributor**  
*May 2026 - Present*

Working with NumFOCUS on building a distributed HEOM solver for QuTiP (Quantum Toolbox in Python). The project integrates PETSc and MPI into the existing solver so that large-scale open quantum system simulations can be distributed across HPC clusters — without touching anything for users who don't need it.

**Key contributions:**
- Profiling the existing HEOM solver to identify memory and compute bottlenecks
- Designing a distributed data layout for the hierarchy across MPI ranks
- Integrating PETSc's TS interface for distributed ODE integration
- Writing HPC tutorials and documentation for real cluster workflows

## Interests

- **High Performance Computing:** Distributed systems, MPI, and scientific computing at scale
- **Open Source:** Contributing to scientific Python libraries
- **Python Development:** Scientific computing, numerical methods, and performance optimization
- **Research:** Open quantum systems, computational physics, and HPC architecture

## Technical Skills

- **Languages:** Python, C
- **Quantum Computing:** QuTiP, PETSc, MPI
- **Tools:** Git, GitHub, Jupyter, LaTeX
- **Web Development:** Quarto, GitHub Pages


## Contact

Feel free to reach out if you want to talk HPC, open quantum systems, or open source.

- **Email:** chinmaytangal124@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** [github.com/Chinmay-Tangal](https://github.com/Chinmay-Tangal)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/chinmay-tangal](https://linkedin.com/in/chinmay-tangal)
- **Twitter:** [x.com/Chinmay_Tangal](https://x.com/Chinmay_Tangal)

---
